UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Anton Halteh is present.
Attorney J. Harmond Hughey appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Morganstern is present.
Attorney Paul Anawalt representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-05-2012 is vacated.
